## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets, credentials, personal data, or generated tokens are included.
- [ ] Relevant lint, tests, build, security, and contract checks pass.
- [ ] Documentation and runbooks reflect the resulting behavior.
- [ ] Failure modes and rollback were considered.
- [ ] All review conversations are resolved.
